mapper.select:
SELECT USER_CD, COMPANY_ID, AUTHORITY, SEX, USER_TEL, USER_MAIL, PHOTO_ADDRESS, USER_STATUS, UPDATE_TIME, LAST_NAME, FIRST_NAME FROM USER_TBL WHERE DEL_FLG = '0' AND ( AUTHORITY IN ('21', '31') OR (AUTHORITY = '11' AND #{form.authority} = '00') )
AND CONCAT(IFNULL(LAST_NAME,''), IFNULL(FIRST_NAME,'')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{form.userName}, '%')
AND USER_MAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{form.userMail}, '%')
AND USER_TEL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{form.userTel}, '%')
ORDER BY UPDATE_TIME DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_TBL SET DEL_FLG = '1', UPDATE_TIME = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), UPDATE_BY = 'SYSTEM' WHERE USER_CD IN ${userIDs}
mapper.insert: insert into USER_TBL (USER_CD, PWD, COMPANY_ID, AUTHORITY, FIRST_NAME_KANA, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME_KANA, LAST_NAME, SEX, COUNTRY_ZIP, USER_TEL, USER_MAIL, PHOTO_ADDRESS, USER_STATUS, DEL_FLG, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY) values ((SELECT next_cd FROM (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(USER_CD), 0) + 1 AS next_cd FROM USER_TBL) next_user), #{userEntity.pwd}, #{userEntity.companyId}, #{userEntity.authority}, #{userEntity.firstNameKana}, #{userEntity.firstName}, #{userEntity.lastNameKana}, #{userEntity.lastName}, #{userEntity.sex}, #{userEntity.countryZip}, #{userEntity.userTel}, #{userEntity.userMail}, #{userEntity.photoAddress}, COALESCE(#{userEntity.userStatus}, '0'), '0', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), 'SYSTEM', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT USER_CD, PWD, COMPANY_ID, AUTHORITY, FIRST_NAME_KANA, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME_KANA, LAST_NAME, SEX, COUNTRY_ZIP, USER_TEL, USER_MAIL, PHOTO_ADDRESS, USER_STATUS, DEL_FLG, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY FROM USER_TBL WHERE USER_CD = #{userId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE USER_TBL SET
FIRST_NAME_KANA = #{a0002VueForm.firstNameKana},
FIRST_NAME = #{a0002VueForm.firstName},
LAST_NAME_KANA = #{a0002VueForm.lastNameKana},
LAST_NAME = #{a0002VueForm.lastName},
SEX = #{a0002VueForm.sex},
COUNTRY_ZIP = #{a0002VueForm.countryZip},
USER_TEL = #{a0002VueForm.userTel},
PHOTO_ADDRESS = #{a0002VueForm.photoAddress},
UPDATE_TIME = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) WHERE USER_CD = #{a0002VueForm.userCd}
